generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to be prepared. Did you know that civil defense programs have been proven to reduce casualties in emergencies by up to 40%? Yet, some politicians want to cut these vital programs, claiming they're 'outdated.' But is it really outdated to protect our communities? We can't afford to gamble with our safety. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
